principle: Membership owns catalog, state, subscriptions, entitlements, and fulfillment results. Order exclusively owns order creation, checkout, and payment status. Product application roots compose both capabilities.
allowedDependencyDirection: order -> payment through in-process execution and settlement ports
order -> membership through MembershipPurchaseFulfillmentPort after settlement
application composition root -> membership and order public packages
application composition root -> inject order-owned checkout port and checkout UI into membership

forbiddenDependencies.reason: Membership has no order creation or payment-status capability; host composition injects an order-owned checkout port
Membership does not execute or orchestrate payment
Payment is a foundation executor and order owns settlement orchestration
Payment must not call business fulfillment capabilities

forbiddenProductionPatterns: @sdkwork/order-* import from sdkwork-membership apps or packages
order SDK bootstrap in sdkwork-membership shell
local order transport facade in sdkwork-membership
payment HTTP callback into membership for subscription activation
canonicalMembershipPurchaseFlow: membership UI delegates checkout intent through host-injected SdkworkMembershipCheckoutPort
order-owned checkout UI renders and polls payment status
order settles payment through payment ports
membership activates subscription and grants entitlements idempotently
verification: membership package manifests contain no @sdkwork/order-* or @sdkwork/payment-* checkout dependencies
membership workspace contains no sdkwork-order workspace members
membership PC app manifest contains no order SDK base URL
